allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project StarkHUD.xcodeproj -scheme StarkHUD -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=tvOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build)

Bash(ls ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/StarkHUD-*/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/StarkCompanion.app/Watch/ 2>&1; xcodebuild -project StarkHUD.xcodeproj -scheme StarkHUD -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=tvOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|BUILD")
